objective: Measure security effectiveness and system performance

metrics.title: Data Isolation Effectiveness
metrics.description: Measure customer data isolation and prevent cross-customer access

metrics.title: Authentication Security
metrics.description: Measure JWT verification and MFA effectiveness

metrics.title: System Performance
metrics.description: Measure impact of security measures on system performance

metrics.title: Compliance Metrics
metrics.description: Measure compliance with data protection regulations
metrics.measurement: 100% compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and other regulations

metrics.title: Security Monitoring
metrics.description: Measure effectiveness of security monitoring and alerting
metrics.measurement: < 5 minutes mean time to detection, < 30 minutes mean time to response

dataCollection.retention: 30 days for operational data, 7 years for compliance data
